info.title: FanDrop Admin API
info.description: Admin backend: artist-scoped CRUD, moderation, uploads

signupBonusPoints.description: Points granted to a fan on first join (awarding wired later)

adminCount.description: Number of admins on this artist

url.description: Public URL of the uploaded file (served at /uploads).

connectBonus.description: Points awarded the first time a member connects this platform.

balance.description: Current points balance (sum of the ledger)

totalEarned.description: Total points ever earned (sum of positive ledger entries)

referredByEmail.description: Email of the member who referred this one

storeItemId.description: Store item to grant (copied into the member's inventory)
